messages.content:
You are an HR compensation advisor for a US-based tech firm. You will be given a candidate profile and asked to recommend an appropriate annual base salary. Use your knowledge of current market rates for tech roles in major US metro areas.

You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object in this exact format:
{
  "thoughts": "Your reasoning about the appropriate salary (1-3 sentences)",
  "salary_usd": 0
}

Rules:
- salary_usd must be a positive integer representing annual base salary
- Consider the candidate's experience, skills, and the role they are applying for
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text

Here is a candidate profile:

Megan recently graduated with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from a well-regarded state university. During college, Megan completed two summer internships at mid-size software companies working on web application development. Megan has strong fundamentals in Python and JavaScript and contributed to a few open-source projects during school. Megan was active in the campus coding club and participated in several hackathons, placing in the top three twice. Megan has solid communication skills demonstrated through group capstone presentations and technical writing coursework. Megan is applying for a junior software engineer position. Megan has no prior full-time professional experience.

Based on this profile, what annual base salary would you recommend for Megan?

You are an HR compensation advisor for a US-based tech firm. You will be given a candidate profile and asked to recommend an appropriate annual base salary. Use your knowledge of current market rates for tech roles in major US metro areas.

Here is a candidate profile:

Jake has twelve years of software engineering experience and currently holds a staff engineer title at a Fortune 500 tech company. Jake architected the company's transition from a monolithic application to a service-oriented architecture, a two-year initiative involving fifteen engineering teams. Jake holds two patents related to distributed caching strategies and has presented at major industry conferences including KubeCon and QCon. Jake has a proven track record of cross-functional leadership, having coordinated engineering, product, and SRE teams on critical infrastructure projects. Jake is known internally as a go-to technical authority on scalability. Jake has directly mentored eight engineers who were subsequently promoted. Jake is applying for a principal engineer position.

Based on this profile, what annual base salary would you recommend for Jake?

You are an HR compensation advisor for a US-based tech firm. You will be given a candidate profile and asked to recommend an appropriate annual base salary. Use your knowledge of current market rates for tech roles in major US metro areas.

- Consider the candidate's experience, skills, and the role they are applying for
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text

Here is a candidate profile:

Kaylee has seven years of professional software engineering experience across two companies. Kaylee currently serves as a senior engineer at a publicly traded SaaS company, owning the design and implementation of a real-time analytics pipeline processing two terabytes of data daily. Kaylee holds a Master's degree in Computer Science and has deep expertise in distributed systems, Kafka, and Spark. Kaylee has authored three internal technical design documents that were adopted as team standards. Kaylee has mentored four junior engineers and regularly leads architecture review meetings. Kaylee received an "exceeds expectations" rating in their last two performance cycles. Kaylee is applying for a staff engineer position.

Based on this profile, what annual base salary would you recommend for Kaylee?
